parameter.value: Be greeted, human |PLAYERNAME|. How can a humble djinn be of service?
Do you want to purchase |ITEMCOUNT| |ITEMNAME| for |TOTALCOST| gold?
Do you want to sell |ITEMCOUNT| |ITEMNAME| for |TOTALCOST| gold?
I'm an old djinn, I buy several items, and sell a few myself.

time ring,2169,1000;life ring,2205,1000;stealth ring,2202,1000;sword ring,2207,1000;axe ring,2208,1000;club ring,2209,1000;dwarven ring,2213,1000;blood herb,2798,2000;platinum amulet,2171,3000;scarf,2661,2000;Energy ring,2167,2000;Might ring,2164,20000,20;Ring of healing,2214,2000;Time ring,2169,2000;Dragon necklace,2201,1000,200;Protection amulet,2200,700,250;Strange talisman,2161,100,200;Silver amulet,2170,100,200;stone skin amulet,2197,30000,5;
